creator: vladimir.cunat@nic.cz
text:
Thanks :-)

Nitpick about the patch: by looking into the history of the file (taken into kresd from another project), it's clear that <alloca.h> was once needed but not anymore, and that "alloc.h" isn't needed but shouldn't break anything.  We (upstream) will remove <alloca.h> in the following kresd releases.
